description: TikTok AI comment analysis and auto-reply (Tikly)

LLM_MODEL_DEFAULT.reason: Default AI model for sentiment analysis and reply generation

LLM_MAX_TOKENS.reason: Token limit for AI responses; too low truncates output, too high wastes budget

TIKTOK_DAILY_LIMIT.reason: TikTok Research API daily quota; exceeding causes 24h lockout

POLLING_INTERVAL_NEW_MS.reason: 2min polling for new videos (<24h); too frequent risks rate limit

POLLING_INTERVAL_DEFAULT_MS.reason: 5min default polling interval; balances freshness vs API quota

POLLING_INTERVAL_OLD_MS.reason: 30min for old videos (>7d); preserves API quota

SERVER_PORT.reason: Fastify server port; deployment config depends on this

TIKTOK_API_BASE_URL.reason: TikTok API base URL; must point to official API
